hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer with experience in building systems with Laravel and Java, also using TypeScript, React and Angular

abilities: Maintained, refactored, and debugged legacy PHP and Java codebases to enhance stability and performance.
Collaborated in SCRUM and Kanban, participating on meetings and code reviews.
Implemented Unit Tests and CI to increase code quality.
Implemented Homologation and Development ambients for security on build features and fixing bugs.
Automated form auto-filling via XLSX file uploads, significantly streamlining data entry for complex forms.
Implemented and refined OAuth2 authentication flows across enterprise ERP systems to strengthen access control.
Integrated an internal AI database with the primary database, enabling unified contract data searches within a single interface.
Developed a time-tracking application to measure employee task completion times and generate automated managerial reports.
Optimized database query performance and implemented full-text-search indexes to accelerate data retrieval.
Implemented a feature of dinamic reports about Carriers.
Implemented Mail Sender and Codebar functionalities.
Corrected and performed maintence on legacy code in PHP.
Improved communication between APIs as well as data processing and error handlers.
Learned how to use meta-data in EAV (Entity-Attribute-Value) tables.
Colaborated in Agile Projects, participating in daily meetings and code reviews.
